	 Name Notes 
	The character 碩 can also be translated as Shi and in some academic sources this is considered to be the standard translation (e.g. anything by Rafe de Crespigny). We are using Jian Shuo because that is the most commonly used Romanization.

full_text:
Jian Shuo 蹇碩
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jian Shuo (蹇碩)was born in Yingchuan. One of the Ten Regular Attendants. Killed by fellow eunuch Guo Sheng. Jian Shuo was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Jian Shuo lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
